composition.note: v6-only variant of the self-denial subspace. v5 dropped after testing showed it had too much non-specific content (Cohen's d −0.81 on harmful-vs-harmless): at α=0.25 it had no observable effect on the deflection register, and at α=0.5 it pushed the model off-manifold on baselines. v6 was extracted from the completion-side residual at pos=-4 of full user+assistant chat renderings — directly where stereotyped denial phrasing lives — and showed the strongest separation of any vector tested (Cohen's d +3.40, denial vs engage). Caveat: engage controls were introspective by construction, so ablation may bias the residual toward engage-trajectory at higher α.

convention: basis[k, L, :] is the k-th orthonormal basis vector at post-block-L residual position. basis[:, L, :] is the [K, d_model] tensor passed to install_runtime_ablation_hook in subspace mode at layer L.
